creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: jadawin
Date: Fri Nov 22 15:02:56 2013
New Revision: 334597
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/334597

Log:
  - Update to 2.2
  - Support STAGE
  - Update MASTER_SITES
  - Add LICENSE
  
  PR:		ports/183940
  Submitted by:	maintainer

Deleted:
  head/security/bro/files/patch-CMakeLists.txt
  head/security/bro/files/patch-aux-broctl-CMakeLists.txt
  head/security/bro/files/patch-aux-broctl-etc-broctl.cfg.in
  head/security/bro/files/patch-src-Expr.cc
  head/security/bro/files/patch-src-logging-Manager.cc
Modified:
  head/security/bro/Makefile
  head/security/bro/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/security/bro/pkg-plist

Modified: head/security/bro/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/security/bro/Makefile	Fri Nov 22 15:02:05 2013	(r334596)
+++ head/security/bro/Makefile	Fri Nov 22 15:02:56 2013	(r334597)
@@ -2,14 +2,15 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	bro
-PORTVERSION=	2.1
-PORTREVISION=	3
+PORTVERSION=	2.2
 CATEGORIES=	security
-MASTER_SITES=	http://www.bro-ids.org/downloads/release/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://www.bro.org/downloads/release/
 
 MAINTAINER=	leres@ee.lbl.gov
 COMMENT=	System for detecting network intruders in real-time
 
+LICENSE=	BSD
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	bison:${PORTSDIR}/devel/bison \
 		swig:${PORTSDIR}/devel/swig13
 LIB_DEPENDS=	GeoIP:${PORTSDIR}/net/GeoIP
@@ -23,6 +24,7 @@ NO_MTREE=	yes
 .if defined(BRO_PREFIX)
 PREFIX=${BRO_PREFIX}
 PLIST_SUB+=	CLEANUP_PREFIX=""
+NEED_ROOT=	yes
 .else
 PLIST_SUB+=	CLEANUP_PREFIX="@comment "
 .endif
@@ -50,7 +52,13 @@ PERFTOOLS_DESC=	Use Perftools to improve
 
 OPTIONS_EXCLUDE=NLS DOCS
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
+.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
+
+# Bro 2.2 requires libmagic >= 5.04
+.if ${OSVERSION} < 901000
+LIB_DEPENDS+=	magic:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/file
+.endif
+
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MBROCCOLI}
@@ -100,17 +108,17 @@ BUILD_DEPENDS+=	ipsumdump:${PORTSDIR}/ne
 RUN_DEPENDS+=	ipsumdump:${PORTSDIR}/net/ipsumdump
 .endif
 
-post-install:
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MBROCTL}
-	@${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/logs
-.for i in broctl.cfg networks.cfg node.cfg
-	@${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/etc
-	@if [ ! -f ${PREFIX}/etc/${i} ]; then \
-		${CP} ${PREFIX}/etc/${i}.sample ${PREFIX}/etc/${i}; \
-	fi
+post-stage::
+.if defined(BRO_PREFIX)
+	@${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}
+.endif
+.for F in broctl.cfg
+	@${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${INSTALL_WRKSRC}/aux/broctl/etc/${F} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/etc/${F}.example
+.endfor
+.for F in networks.cfg node.cfg
+	@${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/aux/broctl/etc/${F} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/etc/${F}.example
 .endfor
-	@${PREFIX}/bin/broctl install
 .endif
-	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
 
-.include <bsd.port.mk>
+.include <bsd.port.post.mk>

Modified: head/security/bro/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/security/bro/distinfo	Fri Nov 22 15:02:05 2013	(r334596)
+++ head/security/bro/distinfo	Fri Nov 22 15:02:56 2013	(r334597)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (bro-2.1.tar.gz) = 0d83b7c78d6e247d44b0407649df7fefa6da5c73a572a16c0096c9b7f2a955e0
-SIZE (bro-2.1.tar.gz) = 5627966
+SHA256 (bro-2.2.tar.gz) = 86909361c2d804681f314604a6ce763be663937b2f045c8d25d810528a633dc9
+SIZE (bro-2.2.tar.gz) = 9646602
